mapper.select: SELECT cdi.chage_seq AS chageSeq ,cdi.prod_cd AS prodCd ,cdi.chage_type_cd AS chageTypeCd ,cdi.bill_amt AS billAmt ,cdi.dcAmt AS dcAmt ,SUM(NVL(ai.adj_amt, 0)) AS adjAmt ,cdi.bill_amt - NVL(cdi.dcAmt, 0) - SUM(NVL(ai.adj_amt, 0)) AS netBillAmt ,cdi.vat_amt - NVL(cdi.dcVatAmt, 0) - SUM(NVL(ai.vat_adj_amt, 0)) AS netVatAmt ,cdi.chage_imps_st_dt AS chageImpsStDt ,cdi.chage_imps_fns_dt AS chageImpsFnsDt ,cdi.svc_cont_no AS svcContNo ,snh.svc_no AS svcNo FROM ( SELECT ci.bill_acc_no ,ci.svc_cont_no ,ci.chage_seq ,ci.prod_cd ,ci.chage_type_cd ,ci.bill_amt ,ci.vat_amt ,SUM(NVL(di.dc_amt, 0)) AS dcAmt ,SUM(NVL(di.dc_vat_amt, 0)) AS dcVatAmt ,ci.chage_imps_st_dt ,ci.chage_imps_fns_dt FROM chage_info ci ,dc_info di WHERE ci.bill_cnfm_seq = #{billCnfmSeq} AND ci.chage_aply_dt IS NOT NULL AND ci.bill_acc_no = di.bill_acc_no(+) AND ci.bill_tgt_ym = di.bill_tgt_ym(+) AND ci.chage_seq = di.chage_seq(+) GROUP BY ci.chage_seq ) cdi ,adj_info ai ,svc_no_hst snh WHERE 1=1 AND cdi.bill_acc_no = ai.bill_acc_no(+) AND cdi.chage_seq = ai.chage_seq(+) AND cdi.svc_cont_no = snh.svc_cont_no(+) AND cdi.chage_imps_st_dt >= snh.efct_st_dt(+) AND cdi.chage_imps_st_dt < snh.efct_fns_dt(+) GROUP BY cdi.chage_seq, cdi.prod_cd, cdi.chage_type_cd, cdi.bill_amt, cdi.dcAmt, cdi.vat_amt, cdi.dcVatAmt, cdi.chage_imps_st_dt, cdi.chage_imps_fns_dt, cdi.svc_cont_no, snh.svc_no ORDER BY decode(cdi.chage_type_cd, 'R', 1, 'U', 2, 3), cdi.chage_imps_st_dt

SELECT bci.bill_acc_no AS billAccNo ,bci.tgt_cont_no AS tgtContNo ,bci.tgt_cont_div_cd AS tgtContDivCd ,bci.bill_tgt_ym AS billTgtYm ,SUM(bci.bill_amt - bci.dc_amt - bci.adj_amt - bci.pay_amt) AS netBillAmt ,SUM(bci.vat_amt) AS vatAmt FROM bill_cnfm_info bci , bill_item_info bii , bill_acc_info aci WHERE bci.bill_acc_no = #{billAccNo} AND bci.cpay_sttus_cd = 'O' AND bci.bill_item_cd = bii.bill_item_cd AND bii.efct_fns_dt = TO_DATE('99991231', 'YYYYMMDD') AND NVL(bii.adj_posbl_yn, 'Z') = 'Y' AND aci.bill_acc_no = bci.bill_acc_no AND (aci.cmpn_cd = bii.cmpn_cd or bii.cmpn_cd = 'ALL') AND (aci.biz_cd = bii.biz_cd or bii.biz_cd = 'ALL') GROUP BY bci.bill_acc_no, bci.tgt_cont_no, bci.tgt_cont_div_cd, bci.bill_tgt_ym ORDER BY bci.tgt_cont_no, bci.bill_tgt_ym
